Database Bottleneck.description: Database queries are executing slowly or blocking system operations

Database Connectivity Issue.description: Failed to connect to the database server
recommendations: Verify network connection to DB port

Database Deadlock.description: Simultaneous database transactions blocking each other
recommendations: Verify retry logic on deadlock exception

Database Replication Issue.description: Replication delay or failure between master and replica database nodes
recommendations: Check network connectivity between master and replicas

Connection Pool Exhaustion.description: All available database connection pool connections are currently in use
recommendations: Verify connection leak detection is active
Optimize query speed to release connections faster

High CPU Usage.description: High CPU utilization detected on host or container

CPU Saturation.description: CPU cores are fully utilized, causing process queue delays

CPU Usage.description: CPU utilisation is exceeding configured warning threshold

Memory Leak.description: Persistent memory growth indicates resource leakage

Memory Exhaustion.description: The operating system or container run out of memory (OOM)

Memory Usage.description: Memory utilisation is exceeding warning thresholds

JVM Memory Pressure.description: JVM GC overhead limit exceeded or running low on memory space
recommendations: Inspect garbage collection frequency and logs

Disk Failure.description: Disk hardware degradation or total write failure

Disk Saturation.description: File system disk space or inode availability is full
recommendations: Free up disk space (truncate logs, clear temporary directories)
Check disk read/write throughput and IOPS limits

Disk Usage.description: Disk storage usage exceeds recommended thresholds
recommendations: Free up disk space (truncate logs, clear temporary directories)
Check disk read/write throughput and IOPS limits

Network Congestion.description: Network bandwidth saturation or high transmission drop rates

Network Latency Issue.description: High round-trip-time latency or TCP connection timeouts

Network Usage.description: Network interface usage exceeds safety margins

Service Failure.description: Application service is failing or unresponsive to requests

Upstream Service Failure.description: Downstream service failed because an upstream dependency returned errors
recommendations: Check status of upstream API endpoints

SSL/TLS Certificate Issue.description: Secure socket layer certificate is expired, self-signed, or invalid

Rate Limiting Active.description: System requests throttled due to exceeding API rate limits

pending_buffer_fill.description: Pending requests/buffer fill rates are growing excessively

Node Failure.description: Cluster node is offline, unreachable, or crashed
recommendations: Check host system status and availability

Cluster Failure.description: Total cluster service outage or split-brain state
recommendations: Check network connectivity between all nodes
Review cluster logs and consensus state
